title: Free Treat Pack
description: Premium treats that feel like a gift and create instant delight. Perfect for building repeat visits and loyalty.

title: Grooming Add-On
description: Add nails or coat care to grooming and make the visit feel upgraded. Great for encouraging recurring appointments.

title: Toy Bundle
description: A small toy bundle redemption that creates excitement for both pets and owners. Built for shareable moments.

title: Wellness Credit
description: Credit toward a wellness check that supports healthier pets and long-term loyalty. Ideal for seasonal health campaigns.

title: VIP Booking Token
description: Priority booking perk that solves a real pain point during busy seasons. A low-cost perk with high perceived value.

title: Premium Food Discount
description: Discount on premium food that supports higher margin items without blanket sales. Best as a targeted booster.
